eventName: Honest Leadership and Open Government Act of 2007
policyDomain: lobbying disclosure; ethics; campaign bundling; revolving door
affectedActorRule: Covered federal lobbyists, lobbying registrants, leadership PACs, federal candidates and committees receiving lobbyist-bundled contributions, and covered congressional or executive officials subject to post-employment restrictions.
affectedIssueRule: Federal lobbying disclosure, lobbyist gifts and travel, earmark transparency, bundled contributions, and revolving-door cooling-off exposure.
comparisonRule: Compare pre/post channel activity for actors and issues exposed to federal LDA registration and bundled-contribution disclosure against actors, issue areas, or jurisdictions with low federal LDA exposure or unaffected reporting thresholds.
notes: Acquisition seed for the substitution-elasticity protocol. This event row identifies the enactment date of an official reform shock; provision-specific treatment windows must be encoded in the comparison-group product before estimation. It does not by itself estimate channel substitution.
